scope: TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 Flash 4-layer 4xMI350 S4096 TileLang shared-KV deep bottleneck profile

profile_knobs.read: This run is intentionally intrusive. Use it for bottleneck attribution, not for promoted throughput.

step_1.read: TileLang first-use compile and warmup polluted.

ranked_targets.target: MORI routed MoE backward and dX return skew
ranked_targets.read: This is the largest profiled subsystem inside the backward wall. combine_dx is still mostly peer-arrival wait/skew, not raw combine math.
The VJP substage is still GEMM-heavy plus SwiGLU/route work. This is where fused/grouped MoE training backward should pay first.
Full activation checkpointing is a real wall, but no-AC is not yet a promoted path because the longer 8x run hit memory growth and a MORI VJP fault.
Visible but below MoE/AC. Still worth a separate fused or sharded CE/lm-head branch after MoE skew is reduced.

TileLang is promising inside sparse attention, especially layer 2, but it is not the step-level latency bottleneck in the composed canary. The warmed layer-2 inner dKV body is only about 0.225s/rank/step in this 4-layer run.

ranked_targets.target: Tagged dense linear backward outside routed experts
ranked_targets.read: The tagged dense linear bucket is not the current wall. The larger prior MmBackward bucket was mostly checkpoint/recompute and untagged MoE/autograd context rather than these tagged linears alone.

final_step_bottleneck_read.plain_english: The current latency bottleneck is not TileLang sparse attention. TileLang improved the dKV body into a useful range, but the full canary is dominated by MoE routed backward, owner-rank VJP math, dX return skew, and activation-checkpoint recompute. Sparse attention still needs final production fusion, but it should not be the first step-level optimization lever until the MoE/AC wall is reduced.

tilelang_compile_read.observed: TileLang compiled two first-use shape variants during step 1.
tilelang_compile_read.interpretation: This is per layer/route shape first-use JIT, not evidence that TileLang recompiles every step. The run still needs a prewarm/cache discipline before any promoted throughput measurement.

comparison_to_profiler_off_tilelang_run.read: The deep timers roughly halve observed throughput. Keep this run for attribution only.

next_actions: Prioritize MoE backward: reduce owner-rank VJP tail, start dX return earlier or in chunks, and test overlap/AsyncLL only after the VJP skew is reduced.
Prototype a fused/grouped local MoE training backward path that targets w13 forward/recompute, w13/w2 wgrad, w2 dgrad, xgrad/reduce, and SwiGLU together rather than only swapping one grouped GEMM.
Treat activation checkpointing as the second major lever: selective saves for expensive MoE/attention work may be safer than full no-AC until the no-AC memory/fault branch is fixed.

Keep TileLang sparse attention work, but focus it on production integration: prewarm/cache, reduce selected-state bridge overhead, and preserve the current selected-limit dKV body or final-fold contract.
Run promoted throughput only with intrusive profiling disabled; use additive-only or no-profile runs for TFLOPs.
commands: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=sonle5/nexus-titan-rocm722-mori-tilelang:20260604 RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_sharedkv_tilelang_layer_meta_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps2_20260604 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE=explicit_tilelang_dkv CANARY_SHAREDKV_TILELANG_DKV_BACKEND=selected_limit_hsk_bf16_scaled_source CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_sharedkv_tilelang_layer_meta_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps2_20260604/profiling/profile_timing CANARY_DSV4_ADDITIVE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_sharedkv_tilelang_layer_meta_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps2_20260604/profiling/additive_timing.jsonl experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
